title: commicarpus altus
intro: Commicarpus altus, also known as the bushman's tea tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Commicarpus altus include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of the plant typically involves drying the leaves and stems, which can then be made into a tea or infused into an oil to be used topically.
